case_title: VECCHIOLA, GIORGIO DBA MONZA MOTORS VS NGUYEN, STEVEN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO STEVEN NGUYEN RETURNED UNCLAIMED, WRONG ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VECCHIOLA, GIORGIO DBA MONZA MOTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, STEVEN $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: LTR. BY DAN TRUONG, RETURNING COPY OF SUMMON HE REC'D AT HIS ADDRESS IN SAN RAFAEL.
